subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast quaffed the crimson wine of certitude from the brimming chalice flowing with the crystal stream of the All-Merciful's remembrance, and art intoxicated with the pure wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من شرب صهباء الایقان من الکاس الطافحه بسلسال ذکر الرحمن و ثمل من الرحیق
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for the departed, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
